name: rsi_exhaustion
description: Fade overextended short-term moves after RSI hits an extreme and the first reversal candle appears.
entry_rules: BUY after oversold RSI, a multi-bar down streak, and the first bullish reversal candle
SELL after overbought RSI, a multi-bar up streak, and the first bearish reversal candle
Treat it as a faster mean-reversion trade than trend-following setups
exit_rules: Exit quickly if price fails to mean-revert soon after entry
research_notes: This combines the user's 'broken parabolic' and 'RSI exhaustion' ideas into one candle-based rule set.
Stricter thresholds like 90/10 can be tested later if signal frequency is still too high.
